name: github_create_issue
description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository. Essential for tracking bugs, feature requests, and project tasks.

body.description: Issue description/body content. Supports full GitHub Markdown formatting

labels.description: Array of label names to assign to the issue

assignees.description: Array of usernames to assign to the issue

milestone.description: Milestone number to associate with the issue

parameters.title: Bug: Extension crashes on startup
parameters.body:
The extension crashes when VS Code starts up. Steps to reproduce:
1. Install the extension
2. Restart VS Code
3. Extension crashes

parameters.title: Feature: Add dark mode support
parameters.body: It would be great to have dark mode support for better user experience.
